name: Eventlog Cleared Detected
description: Detects the clearing of one of the Windows Event logs, a common technique used by attackers to remove evidence of their activity. This rule specifically looks for Event ID 104 from the Microsoft-Windows-Eventlog source.

prompts.prompt: Windows Event log cleared, indicating potential malicious activity attempting to remove evidence. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **Event ID** {EventID}, **User** {user}, **Process Name** {process_name}, **Details** {details}. Investigate this high-risk event immediately for signs of compromise and to recover forensic data.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Event ID for 'The event log was cleared' (104).

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user who cleared the log.

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The process that cleared the log, if available.

parameters.name: details
parameters.description: Any relevant details from the event log clearing.
